+----------------------------+   +----------------------------++----------------------------+
|  Group 1                   |   |  Group 2                   ||  Group 3                   |
|                            |   |                            ||                            |
| +------+        +------+   |   |  +------+        +------+  ||  +------+        +------+  |
| |  A1  +------->|  A2  +---o---o->|  B1  +------->|  B2  +--oo->|  C1  +------->|  C2  |  |
| +------+        +------+   |   |  +------+        +------+  ||  +------+        +------+  |
|                            |   |                            ||                            |
|                            |   |                            ||                            |
+----------------------------+   +----------------------------++----------------------------+
